title: erodium chium subvar. microphyllum
intro: Erodium chium subvar. microphyllum, commonly known as the dwarf filaree, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the geranium family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The dwarf filaree has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a mild diuretic. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture for internal use, or applied topically as a poultice or salve for external applications.
